programme.title: Scotland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls faces extreme conditions in Scotland's Cairngorm Mountains. S01 E15.

programme.title: Castaway-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear chops his way into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 tsunami. S02 E11.

programme.title: Northern Australia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear will rely on the survival skills honed by the aboriginal people to survive Australia. S05 E02.

programme.title: Western Pacific-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is on an island near Papua New Guinea where he wades across a shark-infested channel. S05 E01.

programme.title: Global Survival Guide-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Famed survivalist Bear Grylls shares his tips and techniques for survival. S06 E06.

programme.title: Jungle Swamp-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls teaches island survival, focusing on finding food and water in barren conditions. S02 E10.

programme.title: Jungle Swamp-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls teaches island survival, focusing on finding food and water in barren conditions. S02 E10.

programme.title: Georgiaeastern Europe-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is in the Caucasus Mountains driving a snowmobile out the back of a helicopter. S05 E03.

programme.title: Bears Top 25 Man Moments-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A survival expert tries to survive the sweltering, crocodile-infested Northern Territory. S05 E02.

programme.title: Kimberley, Australia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in the Australian outback by avoiding sun stroke and deadly crocodiles. S01 E13.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: People capture their first-hand experiences of witnessing natural disasters. S02 E01.

programme.title: Ecuador-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges and eating plants. S01 E14.

programme.title: Everglades-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows all the skills required to stay alive in the dangerous Everglades. S01 E10.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family purchase, sell and evaluate items with fascinating stories. S17 E06.

programme.title: The Deep South-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear navigates the deadly swamps of the Deep South and wrestles with an alligator. S03 E02.

programme.title: Ireland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear tries to survive the rugged West Coast of Ireland as he scales the cliff. S03 E03.
